data.name: The field {0} is required.
data.comment: DataAnnotations [Required] default error message

data.name: The field {0} must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '{1}'.
data.value: The field {0} must be a string or array type with a maximum length of '{1}'.
data.comment: DataAnnotations [MaxLength] default error message

data.name: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.
data.value: The field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.
data.comment: DataAnnotations [Range] default error message

data.name: AppShell_ErrorMessage
data.comment: AppShell: text shown in blazor-error-ui div when an unhandled error occurs

data.name: AppShell_ReloadLink
data.comment: AppShell: link text in blazor-error-ui to reload the page

data.name: TopBar_ModeLabel
data.comment: TopBar: label before the storage mode selector

data.name: TopBar_ModeTeam
data.comment: TopBar: storage mode option for team-shared data

data.name: TopBar_ModeUser
data.comment: TopBar: storage mode option for user-specific data

data.name: TopBar_TabWorkspaces
data.comment: TopBar: navigation tab label for the workspaces area

data.name: TopBar_TabEnvironments
data.comment: TopBar: navigation tab label for the environments area

data.name: TopBar_TabHistory
data.comment: TopBar: navigation tab label for the history area

data.name: TopBar_Tooltip_Settings
data.comment: TopBar: title attribute of the settings icon link

data.name: TopBar_Tooltip_Help
data.comment: TopBar: title attribute of the help icon link

data.name: EmptyContentView_Hint
data.comment: EmptyContentView: hint text shown when nothing is selected in the workspace

data.name: ApplicationEditor_TitleNew
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: title shown in hero when creating a new application

data.name: ApplicationEditor_SubtitleEdit
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: subtitle shown in hero when editing an existing application

data.name: ApplicationEditor_SubtitleNew
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: subtitle shown in hero when creating a new application

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Label_Name
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: label for the application name input field

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Label_BaseUrl
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: label for the base URL input field

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Label_Description
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: label for the description input field

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Label_InterfaceUrl
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: label for the interface/API URL input field

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Hint_Rest
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: hint shown when the interface URL is detected as REST/OpenAPI

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Hint_OData
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: hint shown when the interface URL is detected as OData

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Hint_UnknownType
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: hint shown when the interface URL type cannot be determined

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Label_Collection
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: label for the application group (collection) selector

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Option_NoCollection
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: option in the collection selector for no group assignment

data.name: ApplicationEditor_SaveButton
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: primary submit button to save the application

data.name: ApplicationEditor_CancelButton
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: button to cancel editing and go back

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Error_LoadGroups
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: error message shown when loading application groups fails

data.name: ApplicationEditor_Error_Save
data.comment: ApplicationEditor: error message shown when saving the application fails

data.name: ApplicationGroupEditor_TitleNew
data.comment: ApplicationGroupEditor: title shown in hero when creating a new collection

data.name: ApplicationGroupEditor_SubtitleNew
data.comment: ApplicationGroupEditor: subtitle shown in hero when creating a new collection

data.name: ApplicationGroupEditor_Label_Name
data.comment: ApplicationGroupEditor: label for the collection name input field

data.name: ApplicationGroupEditor_SaveButton
data.comment: ApplicationGroupEditor: primary submit button to save the collection

data.name: ApplicationGroupEditor_CancelButton
data.comment: ApplicationGroupEditor: button to cancel editing

data.name: ApplicationGroupEditor_Error_Save
data.comment: ApplicationGroupEditor: error message shown when saving the collection fails

data.name: ApplicationGroupContextMenu_RenameButton
data.comment: ApplicationGroupContextMenu: context menu item to rename a collection

data.name: ApplicationGroupContextMenu_DeleteButton
data.comment: ApplicationGroupContextMenu: context menu item to delete a collection

data.name: ApplicationContextMenu_EditButton
data.comment: ApplicationContextMenu: context menu item to open the application editor

data.name: ApplicationContextMenu_CreateFolderButton
data.comment: ApplicationContextMenu: context menu item to create an endpoint group (folder)

data.name: ApplicationContextMenu_CreateEndpointButton
data.comment: ApplicationContextMenu: context menu item to create a new endpoint

data.name: ApplicationContextMenu_RemoveFromCollectionButton
data.comment: ApplicationContextMenu: context menu item to remove the application from its group

data.name: ApplicationContextMenu_DeleteButton
data.comment: ApplicationContextMenu: context menu item to delete the application

data.name: EndpointContextMenu_DeleteButton
data.comment: EndpointContextMenu: context menu item to delete an endpoint

data.name: EndpointGroupContextMenu_CreateEndpointButton
data.comment: EndpointGroupContextMenu: context menu item to create a new endpoint inside this folder

data.name: EndpointGroupContextMenu_RenameButton
data.comment: EndpointGroupContextMenu: context menu item to rename the endpoint group folder

data.name: EndpointGroupContextMenu_DeleteButton
data.comment: EndpointGroupContextMenu: context menu item to delete the endpoint group folder

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_Title
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: dialog title when confirming deletion of an application group

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_Message
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: start of confirmation message (followed by group name)

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_MessageSuffix
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: suffix after the group name in the confirmation message

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_ApplicationCount
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: start of message about contained applications count

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_ApplicationCountSuffix
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: suffix after application count

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_DeleteAllButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: button to delete the group and all its applications

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_DeleteGroupOnlyButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: button to delete only the group but keep the applications

data.name: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteGroupDialog: button to cancel the deletion

data.name: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog_Title
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog: dialog title when confirming deletion of an application

data.name: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog_Message
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog: start of confirmation message (followed by application name)

data.name: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog_MessageSuffix
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog: suffix after the application name in the confirmation message

data.name: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog_DeleteButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog: button to confirm deletion

data.name: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteApplicationDialog: button to cancel the deletion

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_Title
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: dialog title when confirming deletion of an endpoint group folder

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_Message
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: start of confirmation message (followed by folder name)

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_MessageSuffix
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: suffix after the folder name in the confirmation message

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_Warning
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: start of warning about contained endpoints count

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_WarningSuffix
data.value: endpoint(s). Deleting the folder will also delete all contained endpoints.
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: suffix of the warning about contained endpoints

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_DeleteButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: button to confirm deletion

data.name: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: ConfirmDeleteEndpointGroupDialog: button to cancel the deletion

data.name: RenameGroupDialog_Title
data.comment: RenameGroupDialog: dialog title when renaming an application group

data.name: RenameGroupDialog_Label_Name
data.comment: RenameGroupDialog: label for the collection name input field

data.name: RenameGroupDialog_SaveButton
data.comment: RenameGroupDialog: button to save the renamed collection

data.name: RenameGroupDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: RenameGroupDialog: button to cancel renaming

data.name: RenameGroupDialog_Error_Save
data.comment: RenameGroupDialog: error message shown when saving the renamed collection fails

data.name: RenameEndpointGroupDialog_Title
data.comment: RenameEndpointGroupDialog: dialog title when renaming an endpoint group folder

data.name: RenameEndpointGroupDialog_Label_Name
data.comment: RenameEndpointGroupDialog: label for the folder name input field

data.name: RenameEndpointGroupDialog_SaveButton
data.comment: RenameEndpointGroupDialog: button to save the renamed folder

data.name: RenameEndpointGroupDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: RenameEndpointGroupDialog: button to cancel renaming

data.name: RenameEndpointGroupDialog_Error_NameEmpty
data.value: The name must not be empty.
data.comment: RenameEndpointGroupDialog: inline validation error when the name field is blank

data.name: RenameEndpointGroupDialog_Error_Save
data.comment: RenameEndpointGroupDialog: error message shown when saving the renamed folder fails

data.name: CreateEndpointGroupDialog_Title
data.comment: CreateEndpointGroupDialog: dialog title when creating a new endpoint group folder

data.name: CreateEndpointGroupDialog_Label_Name
data.comment: CreateEndpointGroupDialog: label for the folder name input field

data.name: CreateEndpointGroupDialog_CreateButton
data.comment: CreateEndpointGroupDialog: button to create the new folder

data.name: CreateEndpointGroupDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: CreateEndpointGroupDialog: button to cancel creating the folder

data.name: CreateEndpointGroupDialog_Error_NameEmpty
data.value: The name must not be empty.
data.comment: CreateEndpointGroupDialog: inline validation error when the name field is blank

data.name: CreateEndpointGroupDialog_Error_Create
data.comment: CreateEndpointGroupDialog: error message shown when creating the folder fails

data.name: ConcurrencyWarningDialog_Title
data.comment: ConcurrencyWarningDialog: dialog title when a concurrent modification is detected

data.name: ConcurrencyWarningDialog_Message
data.value: The data was modified by another user in the meantime. Do you want to save your changes anyway and overwrite the other changes?
data.comment: ConcurrencyWarningDialog: message explaining the concurrency conflict to the user

data.name: ConcurrencyWarningDialog_OverwriteButton
data.comment: ConcurrencyWarningDialog: button to force-save and overwrite concurrent changes

data.name: ConcurrencyWarningDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: ConcurrencyWarningDialog: button to cancel and keep the current state without saving

data.name: EndpointPage_DirtyBadge
data.comment: EndpointPage: badge shown on the endpoint name row when there are unsaved changes

data.name: EndpointPage_SaveButton
data.comment: EndpointPage: button to save the current endpoint state

data.name: EndpointPage_SendButton
data.comment: EndpointPage: button to execute the HTTP request for this endpoint

data.name: EndpointPage_Error_NameEmpty
data.value: The name must not be empty.
data.comment: EndpointPage: inline warning shown when the endpoint name input is blank

data.name: EndpointPage_Placeholder_Name
data.comment: EndpointPage: placeholder text for the endpoint name input

data.name: EndpointPage_Placeholder_Path
data.comment: EndpointPage: placeholder text for the relative path input

data.name: EndpointPage_Tab_Auth
data.comment: EndpointPage: request tab label for the authorization panel

data.name: EndpointPage_Tab_Headers
data.comment: EndpointPage: request tab label for the headers panel

data.name: EndpointPage_Tab_Query
data.comment: EndpointPage: request tab label for the query parameters panel

data.name: EndpointPage_Tab_Body
data.comment: EndpointPage: request tab label for the request body panel

data.name: EndpointPage_Tab_PreScript
data.comment: EndpointPage: request tab label for the pre-request script panel

data.name: EndpointPage_Tab_PostScript
data.comment: EndpointPage: request tab label for the post-request script panel

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_Label
data.comment: EndpointPage: section label for the response area

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_Status
data.comment: EndpointPage: label before the HTTP status code in the response meta row

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_Duration
data.comment: EndpointPage: label before the request duration in the response meta row

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_Size
data.comment: EndpointPage: label before the response size in the response meta row

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_SizeSuffix
data.comment: EndpointPage: unit suffix after the response size value

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_Tab_Body
data.comment: EndpointPage: response tab label for the response body

data.name: EndpointPage_Response_Tab_Headers
data.comment: EndpointPage: response tab label for the response headers

data.name: EndpointPage_Confirm_UnsavedChanges
data.value: There are unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
data.comment: EndpointPage: browser confirm() dialog text shown when navigating away with unsaved changes

data.name: EndpointPage_Error_LoadFailed
data.comment: EndpointPage: error message shown when the endpoint cannot be loaded before sending a request

data.name: EndpointPage_Error_Save
data.comment: EndpointPage: error message shown when saving the endpoint fails

data.name: ImportDialog_Empty
data.comment: ImportDialog: message shown when the import diff contains no changes

data.name: ImportDialog_NewEndpoints
data.comment: ImportDialog: section title for new endpoints in the diff (followed by count in parentheses)

data.name: ImportDialog_ChangedEndpoints
data.comment: ImportDialog: section title for changed endpoints in the diff (followed by count in parentheses)

data.name: ImportDialog_RemovedEndpoints
data.comment: ImportDialog: section title for removed endpoints in the diff (followed by count in parentheses)

data.name: ImportDialog_ApplyButton
data.comment: ImportDialog: button to apply the selected import changes

data.name: ImportDialog_CancelButton
data.comment: ImportDialog: button to cancel the import

data.name: ImportDialog_Error_Concurrency
data.value: Apply failed: Another user changed the data at the same time. Please reload the page.
data.comment: ImportDialog: error message shown when applying fails due to a concurrency conflict

data.name: ImportDialog_Error_Apply
data.comment: ImportDialog: error message shown when applying the import changes fails

data.name: HealthCheckDialog_Warning_Cooldown
data.comment: HealthCheckDialog: warning shown when the health check was skipped due to cooldown

data.name: HealthCheckDialog_Success_Reachable
data.comment: HealthCheckDialog: success message shown when the application responds successfully

data.name: HealthCheckDialog_Error_NotReachable
data.comment: HealthCheckDialog: error message shown when the application does not respond

data.name: HealthCheckDialog_RemoveButton
data.comment: HealthCheckDialog: button shown when not reachable, to remove the application

data.name: HealthCheckDialog_CloseButton
data.comment: HealthCheckDialog: button to close the health check dialog

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Section_Variables
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: section label above the variables table

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Header_Name
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: column header for the variable name column

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Header_Value
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: column header for the variable value column

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_EmptyState
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: empty state message shown when the variables list is empty

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Tooltip_ShowValue
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: tooltip on the toggle button when the value is currently masked

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Tooltip_MaskValue
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: tooltip on the toggle button when the value is currently visible

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_AddButton
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: button to add a new variable row to the table

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_SaveButton
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: button to save the environment

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_CancelButton
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: button to cancel editing the environment

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_NameEmpty
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: inline validation error when the environment name is blank

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_NameTooLong
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: inline validation error when the environment name exceeds 200 characters

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_VarNameTooLong
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: inline validation error when a variable name is too long (truncated in message)

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_VarValueTooLong
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: inline validation error when a variable value is too long

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_VarNameDuplicate
data.value: Variable name '{0}' is used more than once.
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: inline validation error when a variable name appears multiple times

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_VarNameEmpty
data.value: Variable name must not be empty.
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: inline validation error when a variable name is blank

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_DuplicateEnvironment
data.value: An environment with this name already exists.
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: error shown when trying to save with a name that is already in use

data.name: EnvironmentEditor_Error_Save
data.comment: EnvironmentEditor: error message shown when saving the environment fails

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_Title
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: title in the modal header

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_ConfirmDelete
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: start of confirmation message before the environment name

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_ConfirmDeleteSuffix
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: suffix after environment name in the delete confirmation

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_DeleteButton
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: button to confirm deletion in the confirmation view

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_CancelButton
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: button to cancel deletion in the confirmation view

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_NewButton
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: button to start creating a new environment

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_EditButton
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: button in the environments list to edit an environment

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_ListDeleteButton
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: button in the environments list to delete an environment

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_EmptyState
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: empty state message when no environments exist

data.name: EnvironmentManagementOverlay_Error_Delete
data.comment: EnvironmentManagementOverlay: error message shown when deleting an environment fails

data.name: EnvironmentSelector_NoEnvironmentOption
data.comment: EnvironmentSelector: placeholder option in the dropdown when no environment is selected

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_NewButton
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: button to start creating a new environment

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_Tooltip_Delete
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: tooltip on the delete icon button next to each environment entry

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_Placeholder_Name
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: placeholder in the new environment name input

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_CreateButton
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: button to confirm creating the new environment

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_CancelButton
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: button to cancel creating the new environment

data.name: WorkspacesSidebar_NewCollectionButton
data.comment: WorkspacesSidebar: button to create a new application group/collection

data.name: WorkspacesSidebar_NewApplicationButton
data.comment: WorkspacesSidebar: button to create a new application

data.name: WorkspacesSidebar_ImpressumLink
data.comment: WorkspacesSidebar: footer link to the imprint/impressum page

data.name: LinksManager_Section_Label
data.comment: LinksManager: section label above the links list

data.name: LinksManager_AddButton
data.comment: LinksManager: button to start adding a new link

data.name: LinksManager_Placeholder_Url
data.comment: LinksManager: placeholder in the URL input for adding a new link

data.name: LinksManager_Placeholder_Label_New
data.comment: LinksManager: placeholder in the label input when adding a new link

data.name: LinksManager_Placeholder_Label_Edit
data.comment: LinksManager: placeholder in the label input when editing an existing link

data.name: LinksManager_SaveButton
data.comment: LinksManager: button to save a new or edited link

data.name: LinksManager_CancelButton
data.comment: LinksManager: button to cancel adding or editing a link

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_DeleteGroup
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when deleting an application group fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_DeleteApplication
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when deleting an application fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_CreateFolder
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when creating an endpoint group folder fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_CreateEndpoint
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when creating an endpoint fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_RenameFolder
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when renaming an endpoint group folder fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_PrepareDelete
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when preparing the endpoint group deletion fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_DeleteFolder
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when deleting an endpoint group folder fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Error_DeleteEndpoint
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: error message shown when deleting an endpoint fails

data.name: WorkspacesLayout_Confirm_DeleteEndpoint
data.comment: WorkspacesLayout: browser confirm() dialog text when deleting an endpoint (placeholder is endpoint name)

data.name: ApplicationGroupTree_Error_LoadData
data.comment: ApplicationGroupTree: error message shown when loading groups and applications fails

data.name: ApplicationGroupTree_Error_LoadEndpoints
data.comment: ApplicationGroupTree: error message shown when loading endpoint data for an application fails

data.name: ApplicationGroupTree_Error_RemoveFromGroup
data.comment: ApplicationGroupTree: error message shown when removing an application from a group fails

data.name: ApplicationGroupTree_Error_MoveApplication
data.comment: ApplicationGroupTree: error message shown when drag-and-drop of an application fails

data.name: ApplicationCard_Error_LoadApplication
data.comment: ApplicationCard: error message shown when loading an application fails

data.name: EnvironmentContentView_Loading
data.comment: EnvironmentContentView: loading indicator shown while the environment data is being fetched

data.name: ContentHeader_Tooltip_UploadIcon
data.comment: ContentHeader: title attribute of the icon upload button

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_Error_Load
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: error message shown when loading the environment list fails

data.name: EnvironmentsSidebar_Error_Delete
data.comment: EnvironmentsSidebar: error message shown when deleting an environment fails

data.name: RequestAuthPanel_Label_AuthType
data.comment: RequestAuthPanel: label for the authentication type selector

data.name: RequestAuthPanel_Label_BasicCredentials
data.comment: RequestAuthPanel: label for the basic auth credentials input

data.name: RequestAuthPanel_Label_BearerToken
data.comment: RequestAuthPanel: label for the bearer token input

data.name: RequestAuthPanel_Hint_CredentialStorage
data.comment: RequestAuthPanel: hint below auth input fields indicating where credentials are stored

data.name: RequestAuthPanel_Placeholder_BasicCredentials
data.comment: RequestAuthPanel: placeholder in the basic auth credentials input

data.name: RequestAuthPanel_Placeholder_BearerToken
data.comment: RequestAuthPanel: placeholder in the bearer token input
